summary: Tested the mobile layout overlap fix between About Preview and Method Teaser sections at 390px, 768px viewports. The fix (!isMobile && isNarrow) ? '-210px' : undefined correctly prevents the negative margin from applying on mobile.

mobile_390px.overlap: PASS - No overlap. Method section (y=113) starts after About section ends
mobile_390px.marquee_ticker: PASS - Marquee ticker visible between About Preview and Method Teaser (y=78, height=15)
mobile_390px.method_teaser: PASS - 'Grounded in Science. Guided by Depth.' renders correctly below marquee
mobile_390px.section_order: PASS - About Preview → Marquee → Method Teaser sequential, no overlap

tablet_768px.method_section: PASS - Method section at y=5371px (after Venn diagram sticky scroll zone)
tablet_768px.venn_diagram: Venn diagram sticky scroll zone visible (dark background area)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for mobile layout overlap verified working. The marginTop fix (!isMobile && isNarrow) ? '-210px' : undefined is correct and applied properly.
